title: Verify mutual exclusivity with other experiments
description: Test to ensure that a user who is bucketed into the 'Trial Corner' experiment is not simultaneously shown other conflicting onboarding experiments.
preconditions: User is eligible for multiple experiments, including 'Trial Corner' and another 'Onboarding Tour'.
User is bucketed into the 'Trial Corner' experiment by the system.

steps.description: 1. Log in as the test user and land on the homepage.
2. Observe the UI for any onboarding elements.
3. Navigate through the app's initial screens.

expected_result: The user should only see the 'Trial Corner' widget and its associated flow. No elements from the conflicting 'Onboarding Tour' experiment (e.g., coach marks, pop-ups) should be visible.
